Welcome to Fishing Adventures

I was introduced to fishing by my late "Uncle Sonny". My first few experiences were upstate at stocked lakes. It was exciting at first, but once I tasted "THE SALT LIFE," I never looked back. The possibilities are far greater. Now, I have a small center console boat that is kept not far from Smith Point Bridge. I usually cruise between the bridge and Moriches Bay.
